items.text: PGS worker verified tracking+logging suite
omnimind crashed on 4441; relaunched. Cascading impact: voice, SMS, threads, health all gated through omnimind.
beside_inbox_poller crashed; relaunched as user-shell child
Live-by-default pillar locked: refresh and reload obsolete except for opt-in static SOPs/client deliverables
Mobile bottom-bar cluster: tab button now flex-anchored directly left of URL pill, single row, glass aesthetic shared

Native input overlay shipped: Mac MutationObserver scanner publishes input bboxes via SSE; mobile overlay layer renders invisible local <input>s at pinch-zoom-aware coords; per-keystroke streaming with composition events and field-index routing
Sidebar autoclose race fixed (one fixed tracking area, mouseMoved pos check, 160ms debounce hide, pin toggle persisted in UserDefaults)
Live-by-default pillar locked: every Xen-built surface auto-updates without user refresh; static is opt-in for SOPs and specific client projects

Ultrathink overhaul x3: sidebar pin + reliable autoclose, mobile bottom cluster (tab button left of pill), input-overlay v1+v2+v3 collapsed (visibility check, pinch-zoom-aware, type hints, composition events, per-keystroke streaming with field index)
TYPE mode removed from mobile streamer pill — pill is now strictly URL-only per canon. Site typing handled by upcoming input-overlay layer.
Architecture clarified: glass pill is URL-only on both Mac and mobile streamer. Site typing happens directly in fields via input-overlay tracking, never through the pill.
Auto-manifest pillar typo fixed + Genesis 'Let there be light' citation added as the theological root: speech equals creation, word equals work

Locked: auto-manifest pillar. Xen does not wait for commands. Speech is the trigger; ambient mention = action. Three build tracks (audio bridge, input overlay, scroll fix) starting immediately as concurrent files.

Travorium evaluated as high-risk travel-club MLM (BBB complaints, antiMLM red flags, pyramid scheme accusations). Recommended Qi decline financial engagement; stay diplomatic with Anthony since Veronica is likely his upline.
Anthony Vasquez relayed Travorium pitch from Reamus/Veronica (https://youtube.com/shorts/bvCms0Iw9vE) — incoming MLM/travel-club recommendation, intel pending
xen-reply-both helper created: one command fires voice + SMS to both 2217 and 9009 in parallel
Apple Watch line +1 770-780-9009 added to identity.json owner numbers; dual-send canon active for every Xen outbound (2217 + 9009 in parallel)
Cost stat updated to $104 vs $1500 industry avg; live.json republishing on next 5min cycle
Rich Abundance located in Contacts: +1 678-396-0058 (Computer Tech, qualitycomputing.info)
Built kitchen cabinet knobs visual research gallery in <60 seconds, deployed to LAN big screen at 192.168.2.163:8766
Galley kitchens gallery 547 pins auto-pulling from rotating Pinterest queries, family-locked
STT swap to MLX-whisper trialed and reverted same-day; Apple STT canon restored, 1.5GB model purged
xen-say-worker plist patched with Aqua session keys + audio-out-guard gated on TTS sentinel — voice loop stable
Mixture-of-Agents orchestrator shipped: prompt fans to Gemini/Perplexity/NotebookLM/Grok, synthesis via OpenRouter Claude
78 active XenBrowser tabs deduped to 59 unique URLs and saved into Raindrop collection #70294184
Luckie's 3-year personal+L7S archive scraped into markdown file trees for AI agents/MCPs/CLI tools
